Bash(python3 - <<'EOF'
import re

with open\('/Volumes/Code/Amiga/nea-js/quickjs-master/quickjs.c', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

original = content

# Fix: non-JSVarRef pointers that got wrong vflags. prefix
# These variable names access is_lexical and is_const as DIRECT members
# Prefixes that are JSVarDef*, JSClosureVar*, JSGlobalVar* \(not JSVarRef*\)
for prefix in ['hf', 'vd', 'cv', 'cv0']:
    # Replace ->vflags.is_lexical with ->is_lexical for these prefixes
    content = content.replace\(f'{prefix}->vflags.is_lexical', f'{prefix}->is_lexical'\)
    # Replace ->vflags.is_const with ->is_const for these prefixes
    content = content.replace\(f'{prefix}->vflags.is_const', f'{prefix}->is_const'\)

# Fix: vd->vstk.var_ref_idx -> vd->var_ref_idx \(JSVarDef has var_ref_idx directly\)
content = content.replace\('vd->vstk.var_ref_idx', 'vd->var_ref_idx'\)

changed = content != original
if changed:
    with open\('/Volumes/Code/Amiga/nea-js/quickjs-master/quickjs.c', 'w'\) as f:
        f.write\(content\)
    print\("Fixed."\)
else:
    print\("No changes made."\)

# Count remaining problematic patterns
import re
remaining_vflags = len\(re.findall\(r'->vflags\\.\(is_lexical|is_const\)', content\)\)
remaining_vstk_vr = len\(re.findall\(r'->vstk\\.var_ref_idx', content\)\)
correct_var_ref = len\(re.findall\(r'var_ref->vflags\\.\(is_lexical|is_const|is_detached\)', content\)\)
correct_vstk = len\(re.findall\(r'var_ref->vstk\\.\(var_ref_idx|stack_frame\)', content\)\)
print\(f"Remaining ->vflags.\(is_lexical|is_const\): {remaining_vflags}"\)
print\(f"Remaining ->vstk.var_ref_idx: {remaining_vstk_vr}"\)
print\(f"Correct var_ref->vflags.*: {correct_var_ref}"\)
print\(f"Correct var_ref->vstk.*: {correct_vstk}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 - <<'EOF'
import re

with open\('/Volumes/Code/Amiga/nea-js/quickjs-master/quickjs.c', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find all identifiers
idents = set\(re.findall\(r'\\b\([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]{31,}\)\\b', content\)\)

# Group by first 31 chars to find collisions
from collections import defaultdict
groups = defaultdict\(set\)
for ident in idents:
    groups[ident[:31]].add\(ident\)

# Show only groups with >1 member \(actual collisions\)
collisions = {k: sorted\(v\) for k, v in groups.items\(\) if len\(v\) > 1}
print\(f"Total long identifiers \(>31 chars\): {len\(idents\)}"\)
print\(f"Collision groups: {len\(collisions\)}"\)
print\(\)
for prefix, names in sorted\(collisions.items\(\)\):
    print\(f"  Truncated to '{prefix}' \({len\(prefix\)} chars\):"\)
    for n in names:
        print\(f"    {n} \({len\(n\)} chars\)"\)
EOF)

    content = f.read\(\)

original = content

# Order matters: do longest/most specific names first to avoid partial matches
renames = [
    # Group: JS_ThrowReferenceErrorUninitialized[2]
    \('JS_ThrowReferenceErrorUninitialized2', 'JS_ThrowRefErrUninit2'\),
    \('JS_ThrowReferenceErrorUninitialized',  'JS_ThrowRefErrUninit'\),
    # Group: JS_GENERATOR_STATE_SUSPENDED_YIELD[_STAR]

    # Group: JS_ASYNC_GENERATOR_STATE_SUSPENDED_*
    \('JS_ASYNC_GENERATOR_STATE_SUSPENDED_YIELD_STAR', 'JS_ASGEN_STATE_SUSP_YSTAR'\),
    \('JS_ASYNC_GENERATOR_STATE_SUSPENDED_YIELD',      'JS_ASGEN_STATE_SUSP_YIELD'\),
    \('JS_ASYNC_GENERATOR_STATE_SUSPENDED_START',      'JS_ASGEN_STATE_SUSP_START'\),
    # Group: js_async_from_sync_iterator_unwrap[_func_create]
    \('js_async_from_sync_iterator_unwrap_func_create', 'js_afsi_unwrap_func_create'\),
    # Group: js_async_generator_resolve_function[_create]
    \('js_async_generator_resolve_function_create', 'js_asgen_resolve_func_create'\),
    # Group: js_object_getOwnPropertyDescriptor[s]
    \('js_object_getOwnPropertyDescriptors', 'js_obj_getOwnPropDescriptors'\),
]

counts = {}
for old, new in renames:

if content != original:
    with open\('/Volumes/Code/Amiga/nea-js/quickjs-master/quickjs.c', 'w'\) as f:
